examples.title: Backpropagation Algorithm
examples.description: Weight update process for neural networks
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Backprop
INPUT: X, y
FOR epoch IN 1..N:
  FORWARD PASS:
    Compute activations
  BACKWARD PASS:
    Calculate δ for output layer
    Propagate δ backward
    Compute gradients
  UPDATE WEIGHTS:
    W = W - η*∇W
examples.explanation: Implements chain rule for gradient computation

examples.title: SGD Implementation
examples.explanation: Iterates through parameters applying learning rate
